article.title: Tim Draper denies moving Bitcoin, reiterates $250,000 BTC prediction
article.summary: Tim Draper denies moving Bitcoin after blockchain analysts linked him to a wallet that transferred 1,000 BTC to Coinbase Prime.

headline: Bitcoin Profit Ratio Plunges to 43-Month Low

article.title: Bitcoin profit and loss ratio falls to 43-month low
article.summary: Bitwise chief investment officer Matt Hougan said the bottom is “closer than ever,” while a Swan Bitcoin analyst suggested investors buy now at a discount rather than overpaying later.

headline: Ukraine Conflict Sparks $2Bn Market Plunge Amid Donetsk Uncertainty

article.title: Zelenskyy Denies Putin Claim of Securing Donetsk Stronghold
article.summary: Ukraine pushed back on a claim by Russian President Vladimir Putin that Kremlin forces have taken control of Kostiantynivka, a strategic logistics center in the Donetsk region, saying the heavily bombarded city remains under Ukrainian command.

headline: ECB Holds Steady Amid 2% Inflation Rate

article.title: ECB Is in ‘Good Position’ Given Inflation Data, Moulin Says
article.summary: The European Central Bank is in a “good position” following an interest-rate hike last month and data showing inflation has eased with the slump in oil prices, Governing Council member Emmanuel Moulin said on Saturday.
